reviews.comment:

Always clean. Always good. A must-stop!

reviews.comment:
Le sugiero no comer ahi, mala calidad de la comida x el costo, pedi un sándwich de peceto, me hibieran avisado que era tipo fiambre, no pueden ser tan ratas en preparar

(Translated by Google)
I suggest you don't eat there; the food quality is poor for the price. I ordered a beef sandwich, and they should have warned me it was like cold cuts. They can't be so cheap with their food preparation.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtOTV2OHpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos al volver de la costa, baños limpia y una buena cafetería para tomar un descanso.

(Translated by Google)
We always stop on our way back from the coast; the restrooms are clean and there's a good cafe to take a break.
